titleEn: Vivici bags $14.4m EIC funding to scale precision-fermented dairy proteins
titleZh: Vivici获1440万欧元EIC资助，扩大精密发酵乳蛋白生产
summaryZh: 荷兰初创公司Vivici通过欧洲创新委员会加速器计划获得1250万欧元（约1440万美元）资助，用于扩大精密发酵乳蛋白的生产。该公司由恒天然和帝斯曼-芬美意于2022年12月成立，近期整合了丹麦Enduro Genetics的新技术，大幅提高了生物制造中的滴度和产量。Vivici已获得FDA GRAS认证，并与多家合作伙伴签署供应协议，计划在欧洲、美国和阿联酋建设工业规模生产设施。
featuredReason: 虽然精密发酵乳蛋白并非直接应用于智慧畜牧的IoT/AI/自动化技术，但其作为替代蛋白领域的重要突破，可能对传统畜牧业（尤其是奶牛养殖）的长期市场格局产生深远影响，值得智慧畜牧行业人士关注。
contentFull: Dutch startup Vivici has been awarded €12.5 million ($14.4 million) through the European Innovation Council (EIC) Accelerator Program to scale production of dairy proteins via precision fermentation. The blended financing combines €2.5 million in grant funding with €10 million in equity investment. Formed by Fonterra and DSM-Firmenich in December 2022, Vivici has been able to move rapidly by leveraging its founders’ expertise in dairy proteins and industrial-scale biomanufacturing. It recently integrated novel tech from Danish startup Enduro Genetics into its production strain, enabling a dramatic increase in titers and yields, two key metrics in biomanufacturing. “We entered the scene as the new kid on the block, and since then, we’ve leapfrogged a lot of the field and catapulted ourselves to the front,” CEO Stephan van Sint Fiet told AgFunderNews. “We have a very strong technology base, a deep understanding of ingredient applications and marketing, and a team with a track record of bringing innovations to market.” He added: “Commercial momentum continues to build for both Vivitein BLG and Vivitein LF. We’re seeing strong interest and that is converting into action, with supply agreements now signed and being fulfilled from our current supply. The EIC funding reflects that momentum and will help us further scale supply to new customers.” The firm, which raised a $34 million Series A round last year, has also made rapid progress on the regulatory front, attaining FDA GRAS status for beta-lactoglobulin (the primary protein in whey) in Feb 2025 and self-GRAS status for the bioactive protein lactoferrin in Feb 2026. Asked about the timeline for approvals in the EU, van Sint Fiet told us: “We focus on submitting a high-quality dossier to EFSA and hope that this will allow EFSA to arrive at a positive scientific opinion swiftly, ideally within the 18 months that EFSA sets as a timeline for itself.” Vivici has European co-manufacturing partners able to produce at industrial scale and has struck a deal with Liberation Bioindustries to produce its proteins in Indiana in the US. It has also partnered with the Abu Dhabi Investment Office to explore an industrial-scale facility for alt protein production in the UAE. translationZh:
荷兰初创公司Vivici通过欧洲创新委员会（EIC）加速器计划获得1250万欧元（约1440万美元）资助，用于通过精密发酵扩大乳蛋白的生产。这笔混合融资包括250万欧元的赠款和1000万欧元的股权投资。

Vivici由恒天然和帝斯曼-芬美意于2022年12月成立，凭借其创始人在乳蛋白和工业规模生物制造方面的专业知识，得以快速推进。该公司最近将丹麦初创公司Enduro Genetics的新技术整合到其生产菌株中，从而大幅提高了滴度和产量——这是生物制造中的两个关键指标。

“我们以新面孔进入这个领域，自那以后，我们已经超越了许多同行，一跃成为领先者，”首席执行官Stephan van Sint Fiet告诉AgFunderNews。“我们拥有非常强大的技术基础、对配料应用和营销的深刻理解，以及一支在将创新推向市场方面有着良好记录的团队。”

他补充道：“Vivitein BLG和Vivitein LF的商业势头持续增强。我们看到强烈的兴趣，并且这种兴趣正在转化为行动，供应协议已经签署，并从我们现有的供应中履行。EIC的资金反映了这一势头，将帮助我们进一步扩大供应，服务新客户。”

该公司去年完成了3400万美元的A轮融资，在监管方面也取得了快速进展：2025年2月获得FDA对β-乳球蛋白（乳清中的主要蛋白质）的GRAS认证，2026年2月获得对生物活性蛋白乳铁蛋白的自我GRAS认证。

当被问及欧盟的审批时间表时，van Sint Fiet告诉我们：“我们专注于向EFSA提交高质量的资料，并希望这能让EFSA迅速得出积极的科学意见，最好是在EFSA为自己设定的18个月期限内。”

Vivici在欧洲拥有能够进行工业规模生产的合作制造商，并与Liberation Bioindustries达成协议，在美国印第安纳州生产其蛋白质。该公司还与阿布扎比投资办公室合作，探索在阿联酋建设替代蛋白质的工业规模生产设施。
